preview.slippageWarn: Price impact {impact}% exceeds your {current}% slippage — trade may fail

confirm.notice: Please review the details. After confirming, your wallet will ask for a signature.

errors.balanceUnknown: Still loading your balance, try again
errors.unconfirmed: Transaction not confirmed in time. Signature: {sig}
errors.userRejected: You rejected the signature in your wallet
errors.slippage: Price moved beyond slippage; raise slippage or retry
errors.insufficientFunds: SOL balance not enough for trade + fees
errors.noRoute: Jupiter found no route; this token may have no liquidity
errors.rpcForbidden: RPC node refused the request; refresh and retry

page.title: Portfolio
page.subtitle: All SPL tokens in your wallet with live valuation (auto-refreshes every 30s)

portfolio.notConnected: Connect your wallet to see holdings
portfolio.empty: No tokens in your wallet yet
portfolio.autoRefreshHint: Auto-refreshes every 30s · click 🔄 to refresh manually

search.title: Token Safety Check
search.subtitle: Paste a mint address to see if it's safe to buy

token.notFound: Token not found — might be too illiquid or just created
token.rugCheckUnavailable: RugCheck is temporarily unavailable; some safety data may be missing
token.verifiedNote: Blue-chip / stablecoin on verified allowlist. Some 'risk' signals don't apply: e.g., USDC must keep mint authority to issue against reserves — regulatory, not rug.

page.title: Price Alerts
page.subtitle: Get notified when prices hit your target (browser must be open in V1)

permission.unsupported: This browser doesn't support the Notification API
